prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: High-speed rail has the potential to be an economic driver.
High-speed rail is good for air quality.
High-speed rail construction has created more than 14,200 jobs since January 2015.
The majority of construction jobs from high-speed rail are going to Central Valley residents and disadvantaged communities.
High-speed rail has employed more than 860 small, disadvantaged, and disabled veteran businesses.
The high-speed rail project has yielded $7.0 billion in labor income from July 2006 through June 2023.
The total economic output from the high-speed rail project across the State from July 2006 through June 2023 is $18.0 billion.
Senate Bill 545 would study economic opportunities along the high-speed rail route.
Senate Bill 545 focuses on increased land value development incentives and public-private partnerships.
